name: synthesize_video
description: Synthesize a short post-format video for one client via HeyGen, from a script grounded verbatim in that post_draft's already-sourced text (never invented, never paraphrased into new claims by the tool). Called by the ghostwriter specialist itself, inside the content-loop pipeline, only when post_brief.format == 'text+video' — not a separate specialist role. Client-scoped and non-batchable: one call always produces exactly one client's one post's video, never a shared or cross-client render. Distinct from synthesize_video_intro (site-build's one-time, per-client intro clip called by builder); this call is per-post and recurring, called once per content-loop cycle that needs video. Fails clearly (fail-loud, non-retryable message identifying HEYGEN_API_KEY as missing) when the HeyGen credential is unavailable, rather than silently degrading to a stub asset or a cached/placeholder video that would then be treated as a legitimate media_asset downstream.

client_id.description: Client this video belongs to; threaded through to output and downstream fleet events. This call and its output must never be reused across a different client_id.

draft_id.description: post_draft.draft_id this video is being synthesized for; used for correlation so voice_qa and publisher can trace the resulting media_asset back to the exact draft it was generated against.

script_text.description: Exact script to synthesize, sourced verbatim from post_draft.text — never invented, expanded, or embellished by the tool. Any claim in this text must already trace to a claim_status:"supported" finding upstream; this tool does not re-check sourcing, that is voice_qa's job.

avatar_ref.description: Existing HeyGen avatar/likeness reference for this client, if already provisioned. Omit if not yet set up, in which case the tool falls back to a generic HeyGen avatar rather than failing the call.

voice_ref.description: Optional existing ElevenLabs/HeyGen voice reference for this client, if already provisioned, so the video's narration matches the client's established synthesized voice from site-build. Omit to fall back to HeyGen's default voice for the chosen avatar.

asset_url.description: Hosted URL of the rendered video asset; this is the value ghostwriter places into post_draft.media_assets[].asset_url with source_tool:"synthesize_video".

duration_s.description: Rendered video duration in seconds, as reported by HeyGen.

error_message.description: Populated only when status == "error"; for a missing-credential failure this is the fail-loud, non-retryable message naming HEYGEN_API_KEY explicitly.

usage.description: Rolls up into post_draft.usage and then ClientPipeline.usage per the fleet usage-rollup rule; tokens_in/tokens_out are 0 for this tool (HeyGen bills per render, not per token) and are present only for shape-consistency with every other usage-tracked artifact/tool in this catalogue.

cost_usd.description: Actual HeyGen render cost for this call, in USD.
